price on Inny
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2004 at 7:34 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1611533819471
69 posts
10.5 to 13K over the past year. Once saw for less than 10K, once for 17K. This is a great twink item, because when a main gets to a decent enough level to kill for it now, the number of items that outclass this are extensive.

this cloak owns
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2002 at 2:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362135517
View User Forum
2 posts
Just got my cloak yesterday and it owns. I mean, with capped int, the 75 mana is great for caster types, as well as just about all lol, want to say thanx for the uber grp guys, you know who you are, and this is definetly a sweet addition to my gear.

dworian
52nd wiz
luclin
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 03 2002 at 5:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Xusilak the 60 Dark Elf SK on Xegony, guild leader of Machin Shin tanked Derakor the Vindicator with this cloak on.
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 03 2002 at 5:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Xusilak the 60 Dark Elf SK on Xegony, guild leader of Machin Shin tanked Derakor the Vindicator with this ring on.
i must be missing something
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2002 at 10:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775643580
50 posts
i just cant see why it is going for 10-18k. Don't flame...I would really like to know...its a smiters girdle that fits on your back and has one more to each stat plus 100hp...ok i see the hp is a lot but 18K...i dont get it.
▲ Page top
RE: i must be missing something
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2002 at 1:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755919759
16 posts
I play a chanter, and it has nice all around stats: cha, int, mana, hp, and even decent AC. It gives something to everything practically! The high mana/hp are nice (I might be able to take another hit... maybe). I can see 5kp - 8kp on Tunare, but the rarity might up it more. I'll check bazaar to see if I can find any.

Mordigan 54 Enchanter.
▲ Page top
RE: i must be missing something
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2002 at 7:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255050503
10 posts
This is all/all, it is relatively low in weight, it has 75 hp AND mana (smiters girdle does not) and 10 ac is considered average HP for a belt.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 14 2002 at 5:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Regardless of AC or stas but as a trade item this owns for any melee that dont use back item for haste. AC means nothing HPs own the end game. If im in a group and this drops I will call need on it cause it jus owns for 75hp on back. plus stam increase at 4.2 hp per stam point at level 60 unless you have 255 stam which none of my toons do yet. Casters beware this melee will call need on this bad boy to replace my dire-wolf hide or cloak of maelstorm. Dont believe me about HPs own AC get 2 monks same level both epiced, but have one that went for all ac and one that went for all HP. when they duel when it all comes down to the one with most HPs wins.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 31 2002 at 2:35 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Pah...this a druid cloak...this has my name on it like my underwear
Price Check
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2002 at 12:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770418161
9 posts
This is a phenomenal cloak for any class. I am a Ranger and I am definitely enjoying the benefits it gives heheh. PC on Xegony server is 12-15k. I bargained down to 8.5k and have seen as low as 10k. Stay well

Awesome cloak
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2002 at 2:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766203881
14 posts
Very awesome cloak, but its not jsut for casters!! Look at it! its even better for hybrids like a paladin that use both Melee and caster stats, all hybrids use ALL but one of those stats(depedning if u are a WIS based hybrid or Int based) its an awesome cloak, i see it mainly very good for hybrids however.
▲ Page top
Casters
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2002 at 1:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570686196
20 posts
Goto the Casters? Its ALL/ALL. and has as many melee adds as "caster" adds haha. Great for every class.

▲ Page top
MHO
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2001 at 11:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765495255
7 posts
First, I will agree that this item can be used by every class for one reason or another. As an enchanter the item provides several things that would be beneficial. The INT is a given, all pure casters can use it. The CHA is also a plus for helping with mezzes, etc. The additional mana is something again, that any type of caster, priest, hybrid, or pure caster, would use. The strength would be a plus for an enchanter to help carry items, but not really a requirement. The agility helps keep from getting hit. An enchanter not getting hit is more apt to get a mez so to me, this item has more stats that benefit the enchanter class directly, based on primary stats than any other class; however, I still believe that this item makes one of the best back items for anyone who can obtain it.
▲ Page top
RE: MHO
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2001 at 5:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247814425
View User Forum
32 posts
Yes Sir Daddin I would agree with you, but let's not forget about the HP and AC which should also be very important to the weakest high aggro taking class :)

It is unfortunate but you are also correct that this would be an alright item for most classes and a great item for some classes, still.... REALLY great item for chanters. I have been trying to get one for some time. :/
▲ Page top
RE: MHO
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2002 at 2:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759018338
163 posts
Look at the level of attainability, a tank or hybrid will have better by now. Doesn't really matter the tanks will roll on it anyway. You hear em crying out NBG on the expensive tank items but you won't hear them in drops like these, they always get them. Maybe I should start up a tank and do the same thing, at least I'll have something to show for all my work other then level 56 in crystalline robe.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 06 2001 at 9:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Just got one in a GM even in DL because i was the firt person to be killed by a GM contorled dragon!
Definately for casters.
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2001 at 7:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
...and perchance a monk or two. You wanna know why? Cause I just did a search on cloaks with >10 AC. I found 43 cloaks with 10 and up to 35 ac. Most of them had stats, a small portion of them were also crafted items. Many of them so much easier to get than this baby. Dunno why I am even saying this... cause I never saw a melee with this cloak. As for myself? I am a necro. This is about as good as that 10ac 15dr/pr 75hp/mana cloak from Chardok. And only cloak I have found that is better is Cloak of Venom from ToV. Sk/necro cloak with 18ac 9sta 9int 100hp and a couple resists. Other casters don't even have that... So ya, let your local caster get this if it drops and he will use it. Cause I think he WILL use it until he quits the game. Most likely.

Just my 2cp

V.M.
▲ Page top
Why is this a Hierophant Cloak for Casters?
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 8:40 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591755359730
Scholar
60 posts
Ok, I can see all of you pointing at this being a caster item. To some extent I agree, one dropped for us in Seb this weekend and none of the tanks including me asked to roll. But would someone please point out what back item I'm going to get as a Tank, especially a hybrid, that is better. CoF, Lodizal Shell Shield and a few others - extremely hard to get. However, you can get this item with just one or two 50's groups of regular non-uber people in Seb.
▲ Page top
RE: Why is this a Hierophant Cloak for Casters?
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2002 at 4:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764342587
16 posts

▲ Page top
CoF rarity versus Hierophant Cloak rarity
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 12:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757889512
Sage
72 posts
You will get 20 Hierophant Cloaks before you get one CoF. Hierophant Cloaks should still go to casters of course. I just wanted to put things in perspective. Don't get me wrong. If someone GAVE me a Hierophant's cloak, I would wear it. My current cloak sucks. When I got a suitable melee cloak to replace the H. Cloak, I would pass the H. Cloak to a caster guildmate and wear the melee cloak in its place.

Argfeld
Level 52 Monk of the Celestial Fists
Order of the Scattered Winds
Bertoxxulous
